APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Daniel Stern, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Dowd Bros., a Meridian Management Group Co.
Plaintiff's Witness Gil Dowd, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Kathleen Boynton.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 563 Webster St., #C, San Francisco, CA.
The lease is forfeited.
Back Rent and Holdover Damages - $8,683.26
No attoreny fee or cost requested.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2011 Off Calendar
